classification.rationale: The writer uses a MERGE with WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE only (no history row insertion or expiry), which is the canonical dim_scd1 pattern. No SCD2 sentinel columns (valid_from, valid_to, is_current) are present; StartDate and EndDate map to product lifecycle dates from the source system, not SCD2 validity dates.

primary_key.rationale: ProductKey is declared as the primary key via catalog constraint PK__DimProdu__A15E99B3DFC94003 and is an IDENTITY column, confirming it as a system-assigned surrogate key.

natural_key.rationale: The MERGE ON clause joins on tgt.ProductAlternateKey = src.ProductAlternateKey, where the source value is CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) from bronze.Product, establishing this as the business natural key for the product entity.

refactor.extracted_sql: SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS ProductAlternateKey, ProductName AS EnglishProductName, StandardCost, ListPrice, ISNULL(Color, '') AS Color, Size, ProductLine, Class, Style, SellStartDate AS StartDate, SellEndDate AS EndDate, CASE WHEN DiscontinuedDate IS NOT NULL THEN 'Obsolete' WHEN SellEndDate IS NOT NULL THEN 'Outdated' ELSE 'Current' END AS Status FROM [bronze].[Product]
refactor.refactored_sql:
with source_product as (
    select * from [bronze].[Product]
),

prepared_product as (
    select
        cast(ProductID as nvarchar(25)) as ProductAlternateKey,
        ProductName as EnglishProductName,
        StandardCost,
        ListPrice,
        isnull(Color, '') as Color,
        Size,
        ProductLine,
        Class,
        Style,
        SellStartDate as StartDate,
        SellEndDate as EndDate,
        case
            when DiscontinuedDate is not null then 'Obsolete'
            when SellEndDate is not null then 'Outdated'
            else 'Current'
        end as Status
    from source_product
),

final as (
    select
        ProductAlternateKey,
        EnglishProductName,
        StandardCost,
        ListPrice,
        Color,
        Size,
        ProductLine,
        Class,
        Style,
        StartDate,
        EndDate,
        Status
    from prepared_product
)

select * from final
